seed_instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days.
org_constraint: The letter "e" must appear at least 50 times throughout the email.
new_constraint: The letter "e" must appear at most 40 times throughout the email.
instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The letter "e" must appear at least 50 times throughout the email. The letter "e" must appear at most 40 times throughout the email.
response:
Subject: Excellent News Regarding Your Requested Leave Period!

Dear [Employee Name],

We've received your detailed request concerning the extended leave period you've been eager to schedule. Please believe me when I tell you we've extensively reviewed every element of your submission. We've even checked the entire employee leave calendar to ensure there were no unforeseen scheduling conflicts present.

I'm extremely pleased to let you know that we have completely approved your requested vacation dates. These extensive periods of rest deserve to be taken, and we believe these breaks will serve to rejuvenate your energies. We genuinely believe these experiences will elevate your effectiveness when you return to your esteemed role here.

Please ensure that before your departure, every essential element of your current projects receives the necessary attention. We expect you to prepare comprehensive handover documents detailing every element of your responsibilities. Please delegate these elements effectively to [Colleague's Name], ensuring they feel completely prepared to step in where needed. We've even scheduled a brief meeting next week to review these elements together, thereby preventing any potential emergencies.

Remember, we value your dedication immensely. Take these well-deserved breaks, experience everything these serene settings present, and feel refreshed. We eagerly expect your energetic return. Please let me know if there are any further administrative elements we need to complete before these dates commence.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Title]<turn|>
